description: Daily US pre-open market brief — regime scorecard + S|T|C|R scoring + Excel sync.

description: Intraday live-book watchdog (09:00 UTC+8) — silent-when-OK, file written only if a flag fires.
SHADOW MODE (Phase 2) — V029-V035 meta-integration compute; writes meta-additions-staging-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Not consumed by brief/rec until Phase 3 live_date set.
One-time 5-business-day review of V029-V035 shadow-mode output. If all Grade-A rows produce LIVE values >=80% of days, recommend Phase 3 promotion to live scoring.
